overview.label: Tarot
overview.value: III The Empress · X Wheel · I The Magician

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: NUMBERS
related.teaser: Monad is the point before all division — the radiant seed, the single flame from which the ten thousand things unfold.

related.name: Zephyrus
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: ☿ Mercury
related.teaser: Mercury is the quicksilver axis — trickster of thought, breath of inspiration, messenger between…

related.name: ᚹ Wunjo
related.teaser: Wunjo is the festival wind — laughter that tunes a village into one note.

related.name: ᛖ Ehwaz
related.teaser: Ehwaz is the two-as-one stride — trust that doubles distance.

related.name: VII. The Chariot
related.teaser: The Chariot drives the soul through waters of life, guided by will and balanced by opposing forces.

related.name: ♀ Venus
related.teaser: Venus is the rose of harmony — magnetic union, pulse of beauty, lover’s path.

related.name: XVII. The Star
related.teaser: The Star is the light of renewal — a cosmic beacon, pouring hope into the waters of the soul.

related.name: VI. The Lovers
related.teaser: The Lovers are the vesica of creation, the choice of union — harmony of opposites embraced.
